title: Water well to bring clean water in Salima Malawi $8000 needed
summary:
In partnership with SOS https://springsos.org we would like to bring clean water to an area with great need. Clean water can help: 
• Reduce waterborne illness
• Improve hygiene 
• Preventing long, unsafe walks for water
• Support food growth, preparation and sanitation
• Open doors for deeper trust, prayer, and ongoing outreach
body: Clean Water In Senga Bay, families live near Lake Malawi yet still struggle for reliable access to safe drinking water. Clean water reduces preventable illness, strengthens food security, and lays the foundation for lasting community stability. Join us to help fund an $8,000 borehole well by June — and pursue a $30,000 water tower vision that could transform the future of the community to even greater level.
